preferredDeck: Dense surfaces and mobile validation repairs plus feed pressure relief
editorialGuidance: Keep the tone concise, professional, and specific.
Lead with user-facing outcomes across dense surface performance, mobile PWA polish, sync reliability, and release validation stability.
Demote internal cleanup unless it clearly changes the shipped product.
pinnedHighlights: Mobile PWA polish balances the toolbar, tightens the menu and settings surfaces, moves support into a dedicated modal, and fixes reader spacing and fixed action menus.
Friends and Map views scale better with dense data through lighter graph avatars, stable marker data while moving, faster map count preparation, and new performance budgets.
Release validation now keeps Friends graph resize, compact-card, pinch, and position checks stable across CI timing differences.
Feed and WebKit memory pressure are lower during large social views and social scrape preflight.
editorialNotes: Manual production daily rollup for v26.5.702 after generator validation could not consolidate the same train automatically.
